caption_summary: A young man struggles to sign a receipt while suspended in a hang glider amid a storm, showing escalating fear and dizzying aerial perspective.

panels.description: Extreme close-up of a young blonde Caucasian man’s wide, dilated eyes filled with shock and terror; his trembling hand tightly grips a clipboard attempting to sign a receipt; harsh natural light highlights sweat on his forehead and stubble; background blurred to emphasize intense gaze.

Medium shot revealing the man suspended within the chrome tubing of the hang glider; his head whips sharply to the right against a stormy, swirling dark cloudscape; his gaze shifts anxiously between the receipt in his hand and the vast terrifying abyss below; tense body posture with grip tightening on the clipboard.

Wide shot from a spiraling, rolling crane camera angle rapidly dollying out to show the man as a tiny speck on the hang glider framed against immense, swirling storm clouds; lighting dramatic with harsh natural highlights; the man stares straight ahead in sheer terror, emphasizing scale and vulnerability.
